title: taraxacum corniculatum
intro: Taraxacum corniculatum, also known as the creeping dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum corniculatum include its potential to improve liver function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
